summary: AmmiAI Slice 4 (Calendar tab + day-edit + bulk-generate + swap violations) tested end-to-end. Backend: 13 pass / 2 skip in test_ammiai_slice4_calendar.py (pytest_slice4.xml). Verified POST /api/plan/bulk-generate creates all days in range (5 days), only_empty:true skips already-planned days on repeat, force (only_empty:false) regenerates, and range > 45 days returns 400. Verified 7-day rolling variety on consecutive bulk-generated days (no dish repeats > 3x). Verified GET /api/plan/month returns {year, month, days_in_month, plans:{iso→doc}} with days_in_month correct for Feb 2026 (28, non-leap), Apr (30), Jul (31), and invalid month → 400. POST /api/plan/swap now always includes a violations:[] field; manual_edits counter increments by 1 per swap. Two violation-force tests skipped (test_force_coconut_violation, test_force_same_veggie_violation) because swap-options already filters out violating candidates and there is no public list-recipes endpoint to pick a known violating dish ID — the violations mechanism itself is verified present in the swap response. Server code (_detect_swap_violations) correctly detects sour/coconut/same-veggie/curd+fish rule breaches and does NOT block the swap (violations returned as warnings, dish still replaced). Frontend: Calendar tab renders correctly at /calendar — calendar-screen, month-bar with month-prev/month-next chevrons, month-name label ('July 2026'), 7 weekday headers (S M T W T F S), 31 day cells for July 2026, planned cells show 3 meal rows (breakfast/lunch/dinner icon + first-dish name), empty cells show '+' with dashed border, today (July 4) turmeric highlight + dot marker visible. 'X/N days planned' counter updates ('0/31 days planned' → '28/31 days planned' after Plan-rest). Chevron navigation works (July → August → July, month-name updates). 'Plan rest of month (N days)' CTA present, tapping triggers bulk-generate; button label updates with remaining empty-day count. Tap planned day → routes to /plan/day/{date} showing day-edit-screen with day-back, day-regenerate, day-rings (day-ring-kcal/protein/fiber), day-breakfast/lunch/dinner (8 day-*-swap-* buttons present). Swap sheet opens with 3 swap-option-* rows; tap applies swap, sheet closes, meal cards update. calendar-share-btn (top-right) and share-image-row both click without crashing on web (no errors thrown). Plan tab regression passes — plan-screen, plan-mode-toggle (Today/Week), regenerate-btn all present; week view shows 7 week-day-* cards (source-of-truth verified: bulk-generated days appear in Week view). Note: calendar-done banner does not appear after Plan-rest because some past-in-month days (July 1–3, before today July 4) remain unplanned; the 'plan-rest-month' button keeps showing '(3 days)'. UX-wise this is defensible but the acceptance criteria says 'button disappears/replaces with ✓ All days planned when full' — currently it can never reach that state for the current month if any past day is empty. Deprecated packages: none new. Shadow* deprecation still emitted (carried from prior slices).

minor.issue: swap-options filters violating candidates, and no public recipe-list endpoint exists to force a known violating recipe id from a test. Consider exposing GET /api/recipes (read-only) to allow deterministic violation testing, or a debug-only override on swap-options to include rule-breakers marked with expected violations.

issues: 'Plan rest of month (N days)' button keeps showing for past days in the current month that were never planned; requirement says it should replace with 'All days planned' banner when full. Consider excluding past dates from the empty-day counter (only future+today) so the ✓ banner reachable.

react_native_issues.issue: Console still emits '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' from src/theme.ts (open since iteration_2).
Console emits 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Reference: likely in a Pressable/View somewhere in the swap sheet or calendar overlay.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Exclude past dates from empty-day count so the calendar-done banner (✓ All days planned) is reachable in the current month.
OPTIONAL (from prior slices): fix protein_guard allergy leak (iteration_3), migrate shadow* → boxShadow on web, and fix props.pointerEvents warning.
OPTIONAL: expose recipe list / debug swap-options bypass to enable deterministic violation tests.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py plan_bulk_generate: seed = seed_base + (cursor-start).days — gives per-day seed offset for variety across the range. Uses _sanitize_plan + replace_one upsert; only_empty guard branch correct.
server.py plan_month: uses calendar.monthrange → days_in_month is correct for leap and non-leap years. list limit 50 is safe for max 31 days.
server.py _detect_swap_violations: correctly excludes the outgoing dish (current_recipe_id) from other-items when counting sour/coconut/veggies. Same-veggie check iterates all 3 meals — correct.
server.py plan_swap: violations attached after replace_one, does NOT gate the swap. manual_edits incremented on each swap. Good.

calendar.tsx: month grid, plan-rest-month, day cells, share buttons — all wired with testIDs matching request. 'Plan rest of month (N days)' → derives N from days without a plans[iso] entry, including past days (see design-issue note).
day/[date].tsx: appears to render 3 meal cards + rings + swap flow correctly (testIDs day-back, day-regenerate, day-rings, day-ring-*, day-breakfast/lunch/dinner, day-*-swap-*).

Regression: Plan tab Week view still uses /api/plan/week which internally bulk-fills missing days — consistent with the meal_plans source of truth (verified: after Calendar bulk-generate the week view shows the same dishes).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Calendar + day-edit + share + Plan regression checks pass)

seed_data_creation: test_ammiai_slice4_calendar.py creates one ephemeral phone-OTP user per module, runs /api/pantry/bundle, generates plans for various future date ranges (T+1..T+4, T+30..T+36, T+100..T+146), and calls /api/profile/reset + /api/auth/logout on teardown. No manual seed. Browser test also creates one ephemeral user, PUTs profile via API (onboarding bypass), and bulk-generates July 2026.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slice 4 fully working. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_ammiai_slice4_calendar.py for regression. Two skipped tests (coconut/same-veggie violation force) need either a public recipe endpoint or a fixture to select known violating recipe IDs. Onboarding bypass pattern for browser tests: extract localStorage['ammiai.session_token'] (JSON.parse), then PUT /api/profile with onboarding_complete:true + POST /api/pantry/bundle before navigating to /calendar. Existing testIDs verified: calendar-screen, month-bar, month-prev, month-next, month-name, cell-{YYYY-MM-DD}, plan-rest-month (calendar-done not verified visually — depends on all-days-planned state including past days), calendar-share-btn, share-image-row, day-edit-screen, day-back, day-regenerate, day-rings, day-ring-{kcal,protein,fiber}, day-{breakfast,lunch,dinner}, day-*-swap-*, swap-sheet, swap-option-*. Open bug from prior iteration: enforce_protein_guard() no_coconut allergy leak (iteration_3).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no new bugs. Only observation: plan-rest-month counter includes past days of current month, so calendar-done banner is unreachable for the current month if any past-of-today day is empty. Suggested one-line fix in calendar.tsx: filter empty days by `iso >= todayIso` when building emptyDaysCount / when driving the calendar-done banner (behaviour for future months is unaffected because all days are >= today).
